title: Pinon Fijo Y La Magia De La Musica
original_title: Piñón Fijo y la magia de la música
overview: Piñon Fijo is giving a show at the circus with his friend El Cabrito. At the end he discovers Cri Cri, a cricket who asks him to help him to save his friends from the evil cuis and his henchmen.
